_comment_top: R6 task 107 (D-H-07, FR-15) — seed row for the RiskDetectorHandler typed handler (LLM-assisted risk identification + deterministic code-based severity scoring).
_comment_routing: Runtime invocation routes to the C# class via sprk_handlerclass = 'RiskDetectorHandler' (= nameof handler class).
_comment_consumption: Read by scripts/Seed-TypedHandlers.ps1. Idempotent — script queries by sprk_toolcode first; UPSERTs.
_comment_toolcode: R6 audit item 4 (2026-06-07): sprk_toolcode column extended manually from 10 to 100 chars. Renamed from 'RISK-DET@1' to descriptive 'RISK-DETECTOR'. NO @v1 suffix per cross-environment migration policy.
sprk_description: LLM-assisted risk identification with deterministic code-based severity scoring. The LLM identifies risks across legal, financial, operational, reputational, compliance, data-privacy, and contract categories with raw confidence values; the handler then assigns a final severity bucket (low / medium / high / critical) using a configurable per-category-weight × confidence formula. Severity is deterministic — identical LLM output + identical configuration produces byte-identical severity output across runs (FR-15 binding for legal-review reproducibility).
_comment_availableincontexts: 100000002 = Both (Playbook + Chat). FR-15 acceptance: invocable from both playbook orchestration (contract review workflows) and chat-driven function calling (ad-hoc risk inspection).

sprk_jsonschema.title: RiskDetectorHandler Request
sprk_jsonschema.description: Argument shape for chat-driven invocation of RiskDetectorHandler. The 'text' field carries the input to scan for risks; optional 'riskCategories', 'severityLevels', and 'confidenceThreshold' override the row's default configuration for a single invocation.

text.description: Free-text input to scan for risks (contract section, email thread, transaction summary). The handler invokes the LLM with this text + configured category enum + confidence threshold, then applies deterministic severity scoring + filtering.

riskCategories.description: Optional subset of risk categories to detect. When omitted, all 7 supported categories are detected.

severityLevels.description: Optional allow-list of severity buckets to emit. When omitted, all 4 buckets pass through. Restricting (e.g., ['high','critical']) filters out lower-severity risks before output.

confidenceThreshold.description: Optional override for the minimum LLM confidence to include in results (0.0-1.0). Defaults to 0.6 if omitted.

sprk_configuration._comment: Default configuration. Per-invocation tool args may override riskCategories / severityLevels / confidenceThreshold / categoryWeights. Defaults reflect legal-domain priorities — privacy + legal at top, operational + reputational lower. Restrict via riskCategories for narrower workflows (e.g., ['legal','contract'] for redline review). Tighten via severityLevels for high-stakes flows (e.g., ['high','critical'] for partner review).

_comment_configuration: categoryWeights drive the severity rubric: finalScore = categoryWeights[cat] × llmConfidence; bucket boundaries are low (<0.25), medium (<0.5), high (<0.75), critical (>=0.75). Raise weights to push categories toward critical (e.g., legal=1.0 + confidence=0.95 = critical). Lower weights (operational=0.7) require higher confidence to escalate. confidenceThreshold=0.6 balances precision vs. recall; raise to 0.8+ for high-stakes review.
